data.body:
## Description

Modify `tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh` to add test cases verifying that RED test tasks (create-test, modify-existing-test task types from /dso:implementation-plan) route to `dso:red-test-writer` subagent_type instead of the generic test-automator.

New test cases to add:
- `test_red_create_test_routes_to_red_test_writer` — a task with title containing 'RED:' and 'create-test' and 'behavioral test' keywords routes to dso:red-test-writer
- `test_red_modify_test_routes_to_red_test_writer` — a task with 'RED:' and 'modify-existing-test' keywords routes to dso:red-test-writer
- `test_non_red_test_still_routes_to_test_automator` — a regular 'write tests' task without RED keywords still routes to test-automator

These tests must FAIL before the red-test-writer.yaml profile is created (RED phase).

Test approach: invoke classify-task.py with crafted JSON input, parse output, assert subagent field matches expected value. This is behavioral (runs the classifier, asserts on output), not structural.

Also add corresponding entries to `plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/test-cases.yaml` for the new routing scenarios.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/agent-profiles/test-cases.yaml

## TDD Requirement
This IS the RED test task. Tests must fail before Task 2 creates the profile.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] New test cases exist in test-classify-task.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'test_red_create_test_routes_to_red_test_writer' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh
- [ ] Running test-classify-task.sh shows RED failures for new test cases
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-classify-task.sh 2>&1 | grep -q 'FAIL.*red_test_writer'
